 396        private int LookupTypeIndexByName(string typeName)
 397        {
 398            if (_typeNameTable == null)
 399            {
 400                InitTypeTables();
 401            }
 402            for (int i=0; i<_typeNameTable.Length; i++)
 403            {
 404                if(0 == string.CompareOrdinal(_typeNameTable[i], typeName))
 405                {
 406                    return i;
 407                }
 408            }
 409            return -1;
 410        }
 411
 412        private int LookupTypeIndexByType(global::System.Type type)
 413        {
 414            if (_typeTable == null)
 415            {
 416                InitTypeTables();
 417            }
 418            for(int i=0; i<_typeTable.Length; i++)
 419            {
 420                if(type == _typeTable[i])
 421                {
 422                    return i;
 423                }
 424            }
 425            return -1;
 426        }
